name: Tradier Brokerage API
what_it_does: Full-featured brokerage API providing real-time market data, options chains, account management, and order execution for equities and options — with both production brokerage and paper trading sandbox environments.
use_cases: Executing equity and options orders programmatically for algorithmic trading agents
Streaming real-time Level 1 quotes and trade data via WebSocket
Fetching options chains with greeks for options strategy automation
Paper trading strategy validation in sandbox before live deployment
Building portfolio management tools with account position and balance data
not_for: Futures or forex trading — Tradier is equities and options only
Institutional-grade order routing with smart order routing (use IBKR instead)
Crypto trading — equities and options only
best_when: An agent needs a developer-friendly brokerage API with real brokerage account access, options support, and free market data for retail algorithmic trading.
avoid_when: You need futures, forex, crypto, or institutional order routing — Tradier covers US equities and options only.

auth.notes: Bearer token for single-account API access. OAuth2 for multi-account applications where users authorize their Tradier brokerage accounts. Tokens don't expire for single-account use. Separate sandbox token for paper trading.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: real-time market data API (unusual — most brokers charge for data); paper trading sandbox free
pricing.paid_tiers: Commission-free trading (Tradier makes money on order flow and premium data)
pricing.notes: Unique model: free real-time market data for developers. Commission-free trading with payment for order flow. Popular with retail algo traders for affordable data and brokerage access. No separate API subscription fee.

performance.rate_limits: 60 API requests/minute; streaming endpoints for real-time data

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Good developer documentation with code examples. REST API well-documented. Streaming API via SSE for real-time quotes. Error responses include error codes and messages. Paper trading sandbox for safe testing.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Market data reads are idempotent. Order submission is not — duplicate submissions may result in duplicate orders. Use order ID tracking to prevent duplicates.
known_agent_gotchas: Rate limit of 60 requests/minute can be hit quickly by agents polling market data
Market hours restrictions — orders rejected or queued outside market hours
Options order complexity — multi-leg orders require specific order type formatting
Separate sandbox and production tokens — ensure correct environment for agent testing

security_score_components.security_notes: FINRA-regulated broker. SIPC member for account protection. TLS enforced. OAuth2 for user authorization. Bearer tokens for API access. FINRA and SEC regulatory compliance framework.
